segments.text: Keeping purple on them, they evaded in the air! Up smash also spot dodged!
segments.original_text: 手元に紫携えて空中でかわした 上スマッシュもニュートラル回避

segments.text: And then dodging that forward smash off the ledge with a spot dodge, answering with their own forward smash - nice!
segments.original_text: そしてこの崖横スマッシュをニュートラル回避かわした横スマッシュさすが

segments.text: One more stock and it's all over - yellow with the up throw KO to finish it!
segments.original_text: にもう一発でしょ 黄色の上投げ撃墜とはいえ

full_text: Keeping purple on them, they evaded in the air! Up smash also spot dodged! And then dodging that forward smash off the ledge with a spot dodge, answering with their own forward smash - nice! One more stock and it's all over - yellow with the up throw KO to finish it!

corrections.original: に猛発でしょ 黄色の上投げ犠牲とはいえ
corrections.corrected: にもう一発でしょ 黄色の上投げ撃墜とはいえ
corrections.rule: Garbled transcription: 猛発→もう一発; Kanji homophone: 犠牲→撃墜
